prompt: A highly detailed 35mm low-angle studio fashion portrait of a stylish female model standing on a giant curved white platform suspended above a glossy reflective lavender floor, surrounded by massive suspended circular light rings glowing softly in pastel peach and warm white tones. The backdrop transitions smoothly from muted coral to soft pink gradients, creating a dreamy luxury atmosphere. The model wears a modern artistic suit jacket featuring oversized floral brushstroke patterns in teal, burgundy, and cream, layered over a textured beige top and relaxed tailored trousers. One foot slightly forward for a dominant fashion pose, hands casually inside pockets, looking intensely downward into the camera. Uploaded face must be replicated with 100% accuracy as the exact face reference, preserving every facial feature and realistic skin detail. Soft diffused cinematic lighting wraps around the subject, creating smooth skin tones and glossy fabric textures. Minimal futuristic set design mixed with luxury editorial aesthetics, subtle fog near the floor adds atmosphere, ultra realistic photography, elegant shadows, high-end fashion magazine composition, strong geometric framing, slight film grain, warm modern color palette.
